title: Add Invitee Email to User Invite Webhook Payload
description:
Clarify and enhance the event 0006 (User Invite) webhook payload sent to Zapier. The existing payload included the inviter's user ID, team ID, and email, but did not include the invited user's email address.

The enhancement adds an `inviteeemail` parameter to the webhook payload containing the email of the user being invited. This enables downstream CRM automation: if the invitee hasn't logged in within 24-48 hours, the system can follow up. It also signals user success (wanting to bring more users into the app) for sales prioritization.
acceptance_criteria: Event 0006 webhook payload includes the inviteeemail parameter
The inviteeemail contains the email address of the invited user
Existing payload fields (userid, teamid, email, eventid, accountid) remain unchanged
Webhook fires correctly on user invitation
middleware_changes: Added inviteeemail parameter to the event 0006 Zapier webhook payload in the invitation flow.
api_changes: Event 0006 Zapier POST payload now includes inviteeemail field with the invited user's email address.
implementation_notes: The userid in the webhook is the inviter (not the invitee). The teamid is the team context of the invitation, which may differ from the inviter's own team if they have permission to invite on behalf of another account.
comment_summary: Developer confirmed the webhook structure and added the inviteeemail parameter. Product tested and verified the webhook payload.
